projects.name: Guess The Number
projects.description: As a Freelance Discord Bot Developer, I created and maintained countless bots. The most memorable one, the 'Guess The Number' bot, became my largest and most successful project. It reached over 12,000,000 users across 13,000 servers, showcasing its popularity and reliability. This bot enabled users to engage in guessing games within their Discord servers, handling thousands of game instances simultaneously. Utilizing MongoDB for data storage and Redis caching for optimization, the bot efficiently managed and sorted through a massive volume of messages.

projects.name: Blogify
projects.description: Blogify is a modern and intuitive blogging platform designed to empower users to create, share, and manage blog content effortlessly. Developed during a hackathon, it offers a seamless user experience with features focused on customization, accessibility, and community engagement.

projects.name: Discord Metric System
projects.description: Developed an advanced real-time metric collection and visualization system utilizing Discord's API and the MERN stack. This project involved collecting, processing, and visualizing metrics data efficiently from Discord servers, featuring a streamlined caching pipeline and high-performance APIs for seamless updates and data visualization.

projects.name: Whack-A-Mole
projects.description: Created the software for a Whack-A-Mole game combining real-time interaction with hardware and an engaging UI. This project showcased hardware integration and full-stack development skills, featuring a dynamic game interface synchronized with physical sensors and motors, real-time WebSocket communication, and a responsive React.js-based UI.
